---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for Neuron
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Problem**
What problem does this solve?

**Proposed solution**
Describe the feature you'd like.

**Which layer does this affect?**
- [ ] L1 Input (voice/text)
- [ ] L2 Perception (UI tree/screenshots)
- [ ] L3 Brain (LLM routing/planning)
- [ ] L4 Memory (storage/retrieval)
- [ ] L5 Nerve (action execution)
- [ ] L6 Output (overlay/TTS/notifications)
- [ ] Protocol Bus (MCP/SDK/API)

**Alternatives considered**
Any other approaches you've thought about.
